/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/demo_with_graphs.dir/All_Assignment_2_code/Project_Code/src/demo_with_graphs.cpp.o -o demo_with_graphs  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/matplotplusplus/1.2.2/lib /usr/local/Cellar/matplotplusplus/1.2.2/lib/libmatplot.1.2.0.dylib
